metadata.title: Colored Tags
metadata.description: Colorizes tags in different colors. Colors of nested tags are mixed with the root tag to improve readability. Text color contrast is automatically matched to comply with AA level of WCAG 2.1.

regex.source: .setDesc("Use only white and black colors for texts")

Notice(
            `\u2705 Reset is done
Please restart Obsidian`,
            1e4
          )
regex.target:
Notice(
            `\u2705 重置完成
请重新启动 Obsidian`,
            1e4
          )

regex.source: Notice(`\u2B06\uFE0F Colored Tags: a new version is available`)
regex.target: Notice(`\u2B06\uFE0F 彩色标签：有新版本可用`)

regex.source: Error("Only Bradford CAT with white points D50 and D65 supported for now.");
regex.target: Error("目前仅支持白点为D50和D65的Bradford色差转换。" );

regex.source: Error(`Cannot convert between color spaces ${this} and ${space}: no connection space was found`);
regex.target: Error(`无法在颜色空间 ${this} 和 ${space} 之间转换：未找到连接空间`);

regex.source: Error(`No color space found with id = "${space}"`);
regex.target: Error(`未找到id为 "${space}" 的颜色空间`);

regex.source: Error(`${space} is not a valid color space`);
regex.target: Error(`${space} 不是有效的颜色空间`);

regex.source: Error(`Cannot resolve coordinate reference ${ref}: No color space specified and relative references are not allowed here`);
regex.target: Error(`无法解析坐标参考 ${ref}：未指定颜色空间，且不允许相对引用`);

regex.source: Error(`No "${coord}" coordinate found in ${space.name}. Its coordinates are: ${Object.keys(space.coords).join(", ")}`);
regex.target: Error(`在 ${space.name} 中未找到 "${coord}" 坐标。其坐标为： ${Object.keys(space.coords).join(", ")}`);

regex.source: Error(`Could not parse ${str} as a color. Missing a plugin?`);
regex.target: Error(`无法将 ${str} 解析为颜色。缺少插件？`);

regex.source: Error(`format ${formatId} can only be used to parse colors, not for serialization`);
regex.target: Error(`格式 ${formatId} 仅可用于解析颜色，而非序列化`);

regex.source: Error(`contrast() function needs a contrast algorithm. Please specify one of: ${algorithms}`);
regex.target: Error(`contrast() 函数需要一个对比算法。请指定以下之一： ${algorithms}`);

regex.source: The format is XXXXXX-XXXXXX-XXXXXX for each RGB color.
regex.target: 每个 RGB 颜色的格式为 XXXXXX-XXXXXX-XXXXXX.

regex.source: You can share the best color palettes or get one from the community.
regex.target: 您可以分享最佳颜色调色板，或从 社区 获取一个。
